description: High-accuracy (+/-0.1 deg C), 16-bit I2C/SMBus digital temperature sensor with NIST traceability
notes: Slave addr 0x48 + ADD0 strap pin (4 possible addresses)
8-bit register pointer; 6 registers (Temp, Conf, T_high, T_low, EEPROM_UL, Device_ID)
Best-in-class accuracy +/-0.1 deg C from -20 to +50, +/-0.3 elsewhere
ALERT pin programmable: comparator-mode (limit crossing) or interrupt-mode (data-ready)
